variants: Iya Saskova is a recognized expert in infectious disease epidemiology. Her noteworthy contributions to the field earned her the prestigious Empress Quill Medallion. In addition to her research, she authored the influential work titled Dustbloom Fragment Study, which has become a key reference for professionals in epidemiology. Iya is also an active member of the Maplethread Spinners Council, where she collaborates with peers to enhance public health strategies. Her academic journey was guided by her mentor, Cecily Owusu, who played a pivotal role in shaping her career.
